heroDesc: High-cleanliness precision manufacturing for medical parts
bodyTitle: Medical Part Machining from validation to stable production
bodyDesc: CNC precision machining achieves stable forming of complex contours, hole systems, cavities, threads and assembly reference planes through the collaboration of digital programming, fixture solutions and process inspection. The engineering team evaluates structure, materials, tool path and clamping risks before manufacturing to help customers reduce rework and delivery uncertainty.

panels.title: Precision Capabilities
panels.subtitle: ±0.01mm
panels.body: For critical dimensions, a testing plan can be developed according to the drawing requirements.

panels.title: Surface Quality
panels.subtitle: Ra 0.8
panels.body: It can be used with post-processing such as sandblasting, anodizing, and electroplating.

panels.title: Lead Times
panels.subtitle: 48h+
panels.body: Simple structural prototypes can be quickly scheduled and delivered.

steps.title: Drawing evaluation
steps.body: Identify tolerances, materials, heat treatment and surface requirements.

steps.title: process programming
steps.body: Determine the tool path, clamping, datum and inspection nodes.

steps.title: Processing and testing
steps.body: After the first piece is confirmed, stable processing and process sampling will begin.

steps.title: post processing delivery
steps.body: Complete cleaning, appearance, protective packaging and shipment.

asideCta.title: Need a processing solution?
asideCta.body: After submitting the drawings, engineers will give more appropriate processing suggestions based on structure and batch size.

related.title: Related process recommendations
related.desc: Depending on the part structure and delivery stage, turning, sheet metal, Surface Finishing and other capabilities can be combined to form a complete manufacturing link.

items.title: Precision Turning
items.body: Suitable for shafts, sleeves, and rotary parts.

items.title: Sheet Metal Bending
items.body: Suitable for stands, enclosures and lightweight construction.

items.title: Surface Finishing
items.body: Improve corrosion resistance, appearance and assembly performance.

faq.title: Medical Part Machining FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Medical Part Machining suitable for?
items.a: Medical Part Machining is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Medical Part Machining quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Medical Part Machining?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
